name: Aino Korhonen
headline: Senior Unity Developer and Game Programming Instructor
experience: 8 years building Unity prototypes and 4 years teaching applied game programming workshops.
notes: Strong match for beginner-friendly game development and rapid prototyping.

name: Mikko Laine
headline: Game Designer, Narrative Systems Lecturer
experience: Designed indie learning games and guest lectured on player experience, storytelling, and testing.
notes: Best for storytelling, player experience, and playtesting modules.

name: Sara Virtanen
headline: Creative Technology Educator and Serious Games Specialist

notes: Excellent bridge candidate for the nursing personalization demo.

name: Leo Nieminen
headline: Prototype Engineer and Interactive Media Coach
experience: Coaches student teams through fast playable prototypes and beginner programming fundamentals.
notes: Good fit for programming logic and rapid prototype sprint delivery.

name: Elina Salmi
headline: UX Researcher for Games and Learning Analytics
